verse_text: Again the Lord spoke to Moses, saying,

links.context: The commandment concerning tassels was first given in [[NUM.15:37]]-41. These were constant reminders to keep all the Lord's commandments. For the Israelites, as is true of all men, had a tendency to follow their own mind and will, rather than the will of God ([[NUM.15:39]]). The fault was not with the Law of Moses but with their own tendencies.
